rect.style: stroke-width: 1.16; stroke: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; fill: #C53030; fill-opacity: 0.059;

g.text: sophisticated firms (low resistance) gain most; reluctant firms beyond u ~ 0.75 lose. ATE, ATT, LATE are weighted integrals of one curve.
Marginal treatment effect over unobserved resistance
